<!-- .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md -->

## Summary
Short description of the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the CONTRIBUTING document.
- [ ] Tests added or updated for changes (where applicable).
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, SKILL.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, or docs/).
- [ ] CI passes (lint, formatting, unit tests).
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added (if user-visible change).
- [ ] Security implications considered and documented in the PR body (if applicable).

## How to test
Steps to reproduce or a brief test plan for reviewers.

## Notes
Any additional notes for reviewers.
